Bug_Description: When clicking the login button with valid credentials no action is taken
Steps_to_Reproduce:
1. Navigate to http://localhost:5000/login
2. Enter username: patient1
3. Enter password: Patient@123
4. Click Login button
Expected_Behavior: User should be logged in and redirected to dashboard
Actual_Behavior: Button does not respond; No action taken; User remains on login page
